ARS.name: Arsenal
ARS.note: WC26 heat-map: 11 confirmed reps — Saliba (FRA CB), Hincapié (ECU CB · #5), Gabriel Magalhães (BRA CB), Saka (ENG winger), Ødegaard (NOR captain), Eze (ENG · joined 25/26 from CRY), Martinelli (BRA · BRA bench), Trossard (BEL), Havertz (GER · 2 goals v CUW), Rice (ENG), Gyökeres (SWE · joined 25/26). Jurriën Timber (NED) WITHDREW from WC26 with groin injury (doesn't add to load). Gabriel Jesus (BRA) status TBC due to injury concerns. 11 reps = 2nd heaviest in PL behind MCI (17) — Arteta opener prep significantly compounded by WC fatigue across spine of team. 0.85× discount appropriate (down from 1.0×). · ✅ PL Official Jul 4: Reiss Nelson RETURNS from BRE loan (winger depth · loan-return not signing) · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 10: Illan Meslier IN free from Leeds — deep backup (played 0 mins at Leeds 25/26) · behind Raya · negligible FPL · 🚨 OFICIAL Jul 14: Leandro Trossard OUT→Beşiktaş. Minutes-check: 1997 mins/21 starts 25/26 (genuine rotation winger, ~58% mins) → real ARS departure, frees attacking minutes (Eze/Martinelli/Madueke/Saka benefit). Trossard now OFF the ARS heat-map. · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 16: Karl Hein OUT→Werder Bremen (GK · 0 mins 25/26, 3rd choice) → zero FPL. · ✅ CONFIRMED (backlog-swept Jul 18): Jakub KIWIOR OUT (0 mins 25/26) + large academy release batch (Chapman, Nichols, Ferdinand, Dudziak et al · all 0 mins) → zero FPL impact. · ⏳ LIKELY (NOT OFFICIAL) Jul 18: Christos TZOLIS from Club Brugge, €40m (🇬🇷 24yo LEFT WINGER). Source: Ornstein/The Athletic — "agreement reached, in process of being finalised"; maisfutebol headline is "a caminho do" NOT OFICIAL → LIKELY tier, do NOT treat as done. Minutes-check: 0 PL mins, NOT in FPL DB — his 22G+29A in 52 games was BELGIAN PRO LEAGUE, discount heavily; Norwich spell was Championship. CONTEXT: direct TROSSARD REPLACEMENT (sold to Beşiktaş Jul 14, 1997 mins/21 starts). ⚠️ WIDE AREAS CROWDED: Saka (2218/25), Eze (1885/22), Madueke (1205/16), Martinelli (1065/11) — Tzolis would be 4th-5th in that queue. Do NOT buy on fee or Belgian numbers; wait for pre-season xMin. · 📌 DETAIL Jul 18 (maisfutebol OFICIAL): Trossard signed at Beşiktaş for THREE seasons + one option — permanent, no return route. Confirms the wide vacancy is structural, which is what the ⏳LIKELY Tzolis (€40m) move is meant to fill.

AVL.name: Aston Villa
AVL.note: WC26 heat-map: 7-9 confirmed reps — Lindelöf (SWE C · starts v TUN tonight · from MUN Sep 2025), Konsa (ENG · plays Wed v CRO), McGinn (SCO · played 83min v HAI), Emiliano Martínez (ARG #1 GK · plays Tue v ALG), Watkins (ENG FW · plays Wed v CRO), Tielemans (BEL CM · plays Mon v EGY), Pau Torres (ESP CB · plays Mon v CPV). Possible additional: Maatsen (NED), Kamara (FRA), Buendía (ARG). Bailey (JAM) and Cash (POL) — nations didn't qualify. Onana (CMR) — also didn't qualify. Emery continuity but 7+ confirmed WC reps = 0.9× discount appropriate (down from 1.0×). · 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 McGinn (SCO) back early · -1 fatigue · ✅ PL Official: Modou Keba Cissé IN from LASK (depth/prospect) · Sil Swinkels OUT to Sheffield Wednesday (League One · was League Two loanee) — low FPL relevance · ✅ PL Official Jul 10: Kadan Young LOAN OUT to Annecy (France 2nd tier · development · negligible FPL) · ✅ PL Official Jul 10: Louie Barry OUT to Sheffield Wednesday (permanent · League One · fringe · negligible FPL) · ⏳ LIKELY (NOT OFFICIAL) Jul 18: Morgan Rogers AVL→CHE, £117m/€137m. Source: Ornstein/The Athletic — "verbal agreement, bid accepted, being finalised, medical Monday", 6+1yr. NO club announcement yet → LIKELY tier, do NOT treat as done. STAKES (minutes-verified): Rogers = 3280 mins/37 starts, 10G+8A, 169 pts = AVL top scorer (ahead of Watkins 167). AVL IMPACT if completed: lose best FPL asset; attack becomes Watkins-dependent (next creators McGinn 103, Buendia 102). Downgrade AVL attacking assets pending outcome. · ✅ CONFIRMED Jul 17 (PL Official + maisfutebol OFICIAL + Romano) — LOGGED LATE Jul 18: Johan Manzambi IN from SC Freiburg, ~€60m (🇨🇭 MID). Minutes-check: 0 PL mins (Bundesliga) → NO PL sample, role is projection. €60m = intended starter. ⚠️ Starred at WC26 for Switzerland (QF run) → HEAVY WC load + delayed pre-season, will miss early friendlies. CONTEXT: pairs with the ⏳LIKELY Rogers→CHE exit (£117m) — Manzambi looks like the Rogers replacement, so AVL midfield is being rebuilt, not just reinforced. Fade AVL midfield assets in opening GWs until the new shape settles. · ✅ CONFIRMED (backlog-swept Jul 18): Youri TIELEMANS OUT → Man Utd (£35m release clause, AVL had no say). 🚨 AVL MIDFIELD BEING GUTTED: Tielemans OUT (confirmed) + Rogers ⏳LIKELY OUT (£117m CHE) vs only Manzambi IN (€60m). If Rogers goes, Villa lose their top scorer (169 pts) AND a 21-start midfielder in one window. Heavy downgrade on ALL AVL midfield assets until the new shape is proven. · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 18 (PL Official + maisfutebol + Romano): Yeimar MOSQUERA OUT → Vitória Guimarães, permanent, AVL retain sell-on clause (COL U20 int, deal to 2030). Minutes-check: 0 PL mins (not in FPL DB) → prospect sale, ZERO FPL impact. ⚠️ NAME TRAP: three Mosqueras in play — Yeimar (this one, 0 mins) vs Cristhian Mosquera (Arsenal, 986/9) vs Yerson Mosquera (Wolves, 2137/24). Do not conflate. · ✅ CLUB-CONFIRMED Jul 18 (@AVFCOfficial): Andrés GARCÍA → GETAFE, season-long loan (23yo RB, Levante academy). Minutes-check: 83 PL mins / 1 start — club cite "8 appearances all competitions" but PL footprint is ONE start, i.e. fringe. ZERO FPL impact: Matty Cash nailed at RB (3016 mins/34 starts). 📌 NOTE: AVL DEFENCE IS THE INTACT UNIT — Konsa (3035/34), Cash (3016/34), Digne (1842/21), Pau Torres, Maatsen, Mings all staying. Contrast with the midfield being dismantled (Tielemans out, Rogers ⏳likely out). So AVL defensive assets are NOT part of the midfield fade — they may even gain if Villa sit deeper. · ⏳ LIKELY (NOT OFFICIAL) Jul 18: João GOMES from Wolverhampton, €40m + €5m add-ons (£38m package). Source: Romano HERE-WE-GO — verbal agreement, Wolves accepted, medical authorised, player left training to travel. Per tier policy Romano ≠ official → LIKELY until club statement. 🔑 KEY DIFFERENCE: unlike every other AVL/PL arrival this window, Gomes is PL-PROVEN — 2829 mins/32 starts for Wolves 25/26 (nailed), and he STAYS in the PL (Wolves relegated → Villa). Profile: defensive MID, 1G+2A, 107 pts, 5.3 — a SQUAD upgrade, not an FPL points asset. REVISED AVL MIDFIELD READ: less gutted than first assessed — McGinn (2136/28), Onana (1755/21), Buendía (1753/21), Kamara (1410/17) all remain; Gomes adds proven PL minutes. Creativity still the hole if Rogers (169 pts) departs. Keep the fade on AVL midfield ATTACKING assets, but the unit itself is being rebuilt with at least one proven piece. · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 18 (V. Guimarães announced): Oliwier ZYCH (22yo POL GK) LOANED OUT → Vitória Guimarães. Minutes-check: not in FPL DB, 0 PL mins → ZERO FPL impact. AVL goalkeeping unaffected — Emiliano Martínez nailed #1 (2835 mins/32 starts), Bizot backup (585/6). 📌 Second AVL player to V. Guimarães today (Mosquera permanent + Zych loan) — emerging loan-partner relationship worth noting for future fringe exits.

Heavy WC load + manager + European-cup fixture compound. 0.8× holds. · 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Christie + Gannon-Doak (SCO) back early · -2 fatigue (biggest single-club SCO benefit) · ✅ PL Official: Romain Faivre OUT to Auxerre (fringe · non-PL · negligible FPL) · ✅ PL Official Jul 10: Luis Sinisterra OUT to Cruzeiro (played 0 mins 25/26 · injured all yr · negligible) · 🚨 PL Official Jul 11: Marcos Senesi OUT (free) → TOTTENHAM (nailed #1 CB · 37 starts/6A/£5.2) — BIG defensive loss for BOU · weakens their CS · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 13: Owen Bevan OUT→Dundee (permanent) + Alex Paulsen OUT→Motherwell (loan). Minutes-check: both 0 mins / 0 starts 25/26 (fringe CB + backup GK) → ZERO FPL impact, squad-depth clear-out only. · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 18: Álvaro Rodríguez IN from Elche (FWD). No PL history → unproven at this level, role TBC pre-season; wait for xMin before considering. · ✅ CONFIRMED (backlog-swept Jul 18): Hamed Traoré OUT (634/9) · Alex Jiménez loan-out [see CORRECTION below] · Dacosta Gonzalez OUT → minimal FPL. · 🚨 CORRECTION Jul 18 — I understated this in the backlog sweep. Álex JIMÉNEZ (ESP full-back) loaned to FIORENTINA for the season, salary covered + €20m BUY OPTION (PL Official + maisfutebol OFICIAL + Romano). Minutes-check: 2315 mins / 26 STARTS 25/26 = a genuine REGULAR, not fringe — I filed him as "minimal FPL", which was wrong. BOU lose a nailed full-back for the whole season, and the €20m option means he may not return at all. Real downgrade to BOU defensive depth; re-check their FB situation in pre-season. ⚠️ NAME TRAP: not Raúl Jiménez (FUL striker, 2183/27, released Jul 10 — different player).

BHA.name: Brighton
BHA.note: WC26 heat-map: 6 confirmed reps: Diego Gómez (PAR MID · played v USA), Ferdi Kadıoğlu (TUR RB · played v AUS), Verbruggen (NED GK · played v JPN), van Hecke (NED CB · played v JPN), Wieffer (NED CDM · NED bench v JPN), Maxim De Cuyper (BEL LB · BEL bench v EGY tonight). Minutes-check: 0 PL mins, not in FPL DB → buy-and-park prospect signing; OUT of the BHA squad for 26/27, zero FPL relevance (not even bench cover). · ✅ CONFIRMED Jul 14 (maisfutebol OFICIAL + PL Official both ends) — LOGGED LATE Jul 18: Luka Vušković IN from Tottenham (19yo CRO CB, 1.93m). Minutes-check: 0 PL mins/0 starts — unproven at PL level. Lands in a REAL vacancy: van Hecke (3210 mins/36 starts, BHA most-used DEF) went the other way to TOT. Remaining CB depth: Dunk (2837/31, senior), Boscagli (799/9), Veltman (1047/9), Coppola (193/2). ⚠️ He played WC26 for Croatia → delayed pre-season, will miss early friendlies (same as Muharemović at LEE). NET: BHA centre-back group WEAKENED + unsettled — be cautious on BHA clean sheets early 26/27 until the Dunk partner is settled. · ✅ CONFIRMED (backlog-swept Jul 18): veteran/fringe clear-out — James MILNER (772/7), Adam WEBSTER (0 mins), Solly MARCH (38 mins) all RELEASED; Sarmiento OUT; Gruda loaned out. Compounds the van Hecke exit — BHA squad depth notably thinner. · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 18 (Paris FC announced): Diego COPPOLA leaves PERMANENTLY → Paris FC, deal to 2031 (22yo ITA CB, was on loan). Minutes-check: 193 mins/2 starts = fringe, so the exit alone is minor — BUT it compounds the CB drain. 🚨 BHA CENTRE-BACK TALLY: OUT = van Hecke (3210/36, to TOT) + Coppola (193/2) + Webster (0, released). IN = Vušković only (0 PL mins, WC-delayed). REMAINING senior CB = DUNK ALONE (2837/31), cover is Veltman (1047/9), Boscagli (799/9), Igor (103/1). Kadıoğlu 3130 mins is mostly wing-back, not CB. STANDING FADE on BHA clean sheets until the Dunk partnership settles; if Dunk misses time they have NO proven replacement.

IPS.name: Ipswich (Promoted)
IPS.manager: Gary O'Neil (43 · appointed Jun 23 2026 · 3-yr deal · from Strasbourg)
IPS.note: 🆕 MANAGER CONFIRMED Jun 23 2026: Gary O'Neil (43) signs 3-yr deal · arrives from Strasbourg (took them to UEL semi 25/26). Replaces Kieran McKenna who stepped down Jun 10. Prior PL: BOU (kept up · DoF spat ended tenure) + Wolves (kept up 23/24 · sacked Dec 2024). Pragmatic mid-block 4-2-3-1 / 5-4-1 manager · defensive structure FIRST. FPL implication: IPS GK + CB likely value picks (clean sheet upside · O'Neil shape). Attacking returns less reliable except for nailed striker. WC26 reps: 1 (George Hirst SCO bench). Discount nudged to 0.90× (system known · 0 WC fatigue · biggest upside vs Jun 10 panic). · 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Hirst (SCO) back early from WC (SCO eliminated group C) · -1 fatigue · ✅ OFFICIAL Jun 26: Chuba Akpom permanent from Ajax · £7m (was on LOAN since Aug 2025 · option-to-buy triggered by IPS promotion · was already IPS striker 25/26 · NOT new arrival) · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 10: Emersonn Silva IN from Toulouse (21 · BRA striker · 8G/32 games Ligue 1 · to 2031) — cheap FW watch-list · competes w/ Akpom+Hirst · watch pre-season xMin under O'Neil · ✅ PL Official Jul 10: Cedric Kipre IN from Reims (experienced CB) — IPS defense reinforcement · watch xMin · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 13: Cieran Slicker OUT→Barnsley (loan). Minutes-check: 0 PL mins 25/26 (backup GK, not in FPL DB) → loan for game time, zero FPL impact. · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 17: Chris Atherton IN from Chelsea (0 PL mins, youth) → zero FPL, development. · ✅ CONFIRMED (backlog-swept Jul 18): Arijanet MURIC OUT + Conor Chaplin released (both 0 PL mins 25/26). · 📌 DESTINATION Jul 18 (maisfutebol OFICIAL): Conor CHAPLIN joined LEICESTER — who are now in LEAGUE ONE (third tier, relegated again). So his IPS exit = full departure from the Premier League, off the FPL board entirely. (Confirms the 0 PL mins reading: he spent 25/26 on loan at Portsmouth, 2G+3A in 37 Championship games.) LEE.name: Leeds
LEE.note: Leeds was promoted INTO 25/26 (not for 26/27) → continuity PL club for 26/27 (2nd season back). Manager continuity. GK: Karl Darlow was #1 for most of 25/26 → likely stays #1 for 26/27. Meslier (backup) CONFIRMED LEAVING end of 25/26 (contract expired). 4 WC reps (Gudmundsson SWE, Tanaka JPN, Aaronson USA, Okafor SUI — £18m from Milan Aug 2025, 8G in first LEE season). Darlow as nailed-ish #1 GK is potential budget FPL gem (£4-4.5m). If Okafor becomes WC story → £25m+ summer suitors signal. · ✅ OFFICIAL Jul 2: Struijk OUT to BHA · ✅ PL Official Jul 3: Sam Byram RELEASED (veteran DEF) · Jul 10: Meslier OUT to Arsenal (free) — was FRINGE (0 mins 25/26 · Darlow is LEE #1 w/ 1980 mins) · negligible for LEE · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 10: Harry Wilson IN from Fulham (chose LEE over Benfica) — NAILED attacking MID: 2674 mins/32 starts/10G+9A 25/26 · set-piece threat · GENUINE FPL option (LEE = established PL club, NOT promoted) · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 14: Karl Darlow OUT→Man Utd (22 starts/1980 mins in a 25/26 Darlow/Perri timeshare). CORRECTION (verified full GK depth): Leeds did NOT lose both keepers — Lucas Perri (16 starts/1440 mins, other half of the split) REMAINS + is now presumptive #1. Meslier (0 mins) left to Arsenal; Cairns (0) backup. FPL angle POSITIVE: Perri (4.4) = cheap PL-proven potential nailed-#1 — confirm pre-season vs any incoming signing. · 🚨 OFICIAL Jul 18: Tarik Muharemović IN from Sassuolo (€40m · CB). NO PL history — minutes-check impossible, so role is PROJECTION only. Walks into a SETTLED back line: Rodon (2952 mins/33 starts) + Struijk (2935/33) both nailed CBs, Bogle RB (2795), Gudmundsson LB (2637). €40m implies intended starter but the CB slot is CONTESTED — do NOT assume nailed on the fee (cf. Andrey Santos). Verify pre-season. Net: heavy defensive investment mildly lifts CS outlook → small boost to Perri (4.4) as budget GK. · ✅ CLUB-CONFIRMED Jul 18 (Leeds United official + OFICIAL maisfutebol): Muharemović signed to 2031 (5yr) for €40m, age 23. NEW DETAIL: he PLAYED AT WC 2026 for Bosnia → delayed pre-season, will MISS early friendlies, so no xMin read on the Rodon/Struijk contest until ~2+ weeks in. 5-yr deal + €40m at 23 = long-term first-choice intent, but depth chart still says contested (Rodon 2952/33, Struijk 2935/33 both nailed). Verdict unchanged: promising, unproven in PL, do not buy on fee — wait for late-pre-season lineups. · ✅ CONFIRMED (backlog-swept Jul 18): Isaac Schmidt OUT (0 mins) + Harry Gray loaned out → zero FPL. · 📌 DESTINATION Jul 18 (maisfutebol OFICIAL, Young Boys announced): Isaac SCHMIDT → YOUNG BOYS (SUI), permanent, deal to summer 2030. Swiss RB, spent 25/26 on LOAN at Werder Bremen (1 goal in 19 games) → 0 PL mins, confirming zero FPL impact. LEE right-back unaffected: Bogle nailed (2795 mins/32 starts). Leeds defensive picture now: Muharemović IN (€40m CB, WC-delayed), Schmidt OUT, back four of Rodon/Struijk/Bogle/Gudmundsson all 31+ starts and intact.

Iraola's profile = high-press · vertical · transition football — fits Kerkez attacking-WB role, Isak's mobility, Wirtz as #10 in transition. But: Iraola has never managed at top-6 level. Combined with 8 WC reps (Wirtz/Alisson/van Dijk/Gravenberch/Gakpo/Mac Allister/Isak/Endō) + 5 gold-pick departures CONFIRMED (TAA, Salah, Robbo, Konaté, Quansah-already gone) = HIGH-VARIANCE. Salah's exit confirms the full rebuild — front-3 has to be rebuilt entirely. CAVEAT: whole senior midfield absent (Bruno 3065/35, Mainoo, M.Cunha on WC break) and full XI hooked at HT. 🚨 CORRECTION: Casemiro (2575 mins/33 starts) has NOT gone away — ✅ CONFIRMED RELEASED by MUN (PL Official, repeatedly Jun 14–Jul 15), so that midfield slot is a genuine VACANCY, not a returning-player contest. ⚠️ DESTINATION UNCONFIRMED: Inter Miami is a maisfutebol REPORT (Jun 20, no OFICIAL tag) = LIKELY tier only — do NOT state as fact. Together w/ Hojlund→Napoli, Onana→Trabzonspor loan, Malacia released, MUN midfield/attack is thinned. Santos starting into a real hole = STRONGER signal than a rotation start. Real test = does he hold the shirt once Bruno + Mainoo return. Tielemans is the PROVEN one of the pair — 21 PL starts vs Santos 13. Expect Tielemans to start ahead of Santos once Bruno returns; that reframes the Santos read as competition, not a clear run.
